Exceeding these limits will result in an immediate error with specific guidance. NOTE: By default, this tool requires discussions:write permission. 2026-03-11T08:29:46.1244953Z [36;1m# Fix permissions on firewall logs so they can be uploaded as artifacts[0m
2026-03-11T08:29:46.1245121Z [36;1m# AWF runs with sudo, creating files owned by root[0m
2026-03-11T08:29:46.1245339Z [36;1msudo chmod -R a+r /tmp/gh-aw/sandbox/firewall/logs 2>/dev/null || true[0m
2026-03-11T08:29:46.1245698Z [36;1m# Only run awf logs summary if awf command exists (it may not be installed if workflow failed before install step)[0m
2026-03-11T08:29:46.1245823Z [36;1mif command -v awf &> /dev/null; then[0m
2026-03-11T08:29:46.1245977Z [36;1m  awf logs summary | tee -a "$GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY"[0m
2026-03-11T08:29:46.1246062Z [36;1melse[0m

2026-03-11T08:29:46.1246335Z [36;1mfi[0m
